overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character in a dark industrial basement performing a stealth takedown on an NPC guard, then traversing through concrete corridors with vending machines and equipment, finally descending into a rocky cave tunnel. The environment features green-tinted fluorescent lighting and atmospheric fog throughout.

events.description: character performs stealth takedown on guard standing near railing

agents.ego_description: approaching guard from behind and executing a stealth kill animation

notable_agents.action: guard standing stationary near railing, looking away from approaching character

entered.detail: tall yellow and brown vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dimly lit industrial basement with green fluorescent lighting. A yellow vending machine stands on the left while the character approaches a guard from behind near a metal railing on the right. At approximately 5 seconds, the character performs a stealth takedown, and the guard collapses to the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete maintenance corridor with industrial equipment

events.description: ambient lighting dims significantly as character moves deeper into basement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through corridors, passing vending machines and industrial equipment

entered.detail: vending machine with bright colorful digital signage displaying advertisements
yellow metal ladder attached to wall leading to upper level
metal shelving units stacked with crates and equipment
concrete stairs leading downward to lower level

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a series of concrete corridors in the industrial basement, passing colorful vending machines on the left and industrial shelving on the right. The lighting gradually dims around the 25-second mark. A yellow ladder appears on the left wall as the character approaches a stairwell leading downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cave tunnel with abandoned industrial debris

events.description: character descends stairs and enters natural cave tunnel with rocky walls

agents.ego_description: carefully descending into the cave tunnel, moving toward abandoned vehicle with headlights

entered.detail: rough natural rock walls with uneven texture replacing concrete surfaces
vehicle with illuminated headlights parked in the cave tunnel
piles of rubble and abandoned equipment scattered on cave floor

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the industrial basement into a natural cave tunnel with rocky walls and dirt ground. An abandoned vehicle with glowing headlights sits in the distance. The environment shifts from artificial concrete architecture to rough cave rock with scattered debris and abandoned machinery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial basement that gradually transitions into a rugged, natural cave system. It begins in a dimly lit area with green fluorescent lighting, where the camera tracks a character passing a yellow vending machine to perform a stealth takedown on a guard near a metal railing. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a series of concrete corridors lined with colorful vending machines and industrial shelving before the lighting dims near a yellow ladder and a descending stairwell. The environment then opens up as the artificial concrete architecture gives way to a rocky cave tunnel with dirt ground and scattered debris. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the cavern, revealing an abandoned vehicle with glowing headlights resting in the distance.
